column2: # FULL DIAGNOSTIC BLOCK — High p(Z|X), Z = 0, D = 1, and kappa leverage
#   Diagnose whether low ESS / unstable kappa profiles are driven by observations
#   with high predicted probability of Z = 1, but observed Z = 0 and D = 1.
#   If p_i = P(Z_i = 1 | X_i) is high, but Z_i = 0 and D_i = 1, then
#   becomes very negative because the term 1/(1-p_i) is large.
